productDisplayName: Fastrack Women Polyester Black Sling Bag
description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this beige handbag from fastrack will come in handy! Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall or to college. And don't you be deceived by its compact look, for there's ample space to hold all your essentials! Height: 23 cm Width: 38 cm Made of nylon for durability and comfort One large zippered compartment with a small zippered pocket and an organiser pouch inside to stash away essentials One roomy compartment with velcro closures at the back, along with a smaller zippered compartment Two zippered pockets on the front Single adjustable strap to hang the bag from the shoulder Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long life Brand name embroidered on the front in large lettering Brand tab appliqué d on the side Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
